blended.narrative: Gunstock Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.4 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,133 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.6" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
